description_long: This bungalow features a single-story, flat-roofed design with a modern, rectilinear layout. The exterior is primarily clad in brown brick, complemented by large white-framed windows and sliding glass doors that provide ample natural light. A small, green lawn area and a couple of mature trees are integrated into the property, enhancing its suburban appeal. The front facade includes a covered porch area with a paved surface, offering a sheltered entryway. The roofline is clean and unembellished, emphasizing the minimalist architectural style. The overall structure is compact, with a clear separation between living spaces and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story brick bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a covered porch, set alongside a small lawn and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large sliding glass doors, and a tree on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a smaller window, the back lawn, and two trees positioned at the back corner.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the green lawn area and a tree in a planter near the corner.
description_view_3: Main facade with two large windows, a covered porch, and a tree to the left, emphasizing the entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
